description: SHA-256 checksums for ePiE data archives hosted on GitHub Releases

epie_basins_volta.tar.gz.contents: Inputs/basins/volta/ — HydroSHEDS river shapefiles, GeoGLOWS discharge, lakes, canals, slope raster

epie_basins_bega.tar.gz.contents: Inputs/basins/bega/ — Bega river shapefile, lakes, slope raster

epie_outputs_prebuilt.tar.gz.contents: Outputs/ — pre-built networks for volta_wet, volta_dry, volta_geoglows_wet, bega

hydrosheds.notes: Register for free account. Download HydroRIVERS (ASF) for Africa (Volta) and Europe (Bega) regions, plus basin boundary shapefiles.

flo1k.notes: Download mean annual discharge GeoTIFF. Used as HydroSHEDS flow data source.

worldclim.description: WorldClim v2 temperature and precipitation rasters
worldclim.notes: Download Bio/temperature variables (tiff) at 30 arc-seconds for the target region.

ghs_pop.description: GHS-POP global human settlement population grid
ghs_pop.notes: Download population raster at 30 arc-seconds for the target region.
